{"id":"project-LICHEN-tg2h","title":"[epic] Extract Renode STM32WL SubGHz peripheral as standalone project","description":"Phase 3: Add STM32WL SubGHz peripheral to renode-lora-peripherals monorepo.

SCOPE:
1. Add peripherals/stm32wl-subghz/ with LichenSubGHz.cs
2. Add STM32WL_PWR.cs and STM32WL_RCC.cs stubs
3. Add boards/nucleo-wl55jc/ platform definition
4. Example: Zephyr lora_send sample transmits
5. CI: Nucleo-WL55JC boots and TX works

PARALLEL TO: 94ju (different chip family, no dependency)

DELIVERABLE: STM32WL devs can test LoRa firmware in Renode
